---
title: "Publications"
---

Below is a selection of publications authored by members of the Crowell Lab. For a comprehensive list, please visit our [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com) profile.

## 2026

- *Placeholder for 2026 publication.* Replace this section with actual citations (e.g., using the APA format).

## 2025

- *Placeholder for 2025 publication.* Replace this section with actual citations.

## 2024

- *Placeholder for 2024 publication.* Replace this section with actual citations.

You can use Quarto's citation support by maintaining a `references.bib` file and citing with `[@crowell2024example]` within your pages.
